detail: Fresh release binaries were installed and started via viewer-ctl. Log-viewer resolved context-stack test logs (exists=true) and workspace root under context-engine; doc-viewer resolved target/logs, agents, crates, and tools under context-engine. External Chromium and Playwright screenshots verified nonblank rendering at 1280x800 and 390x844. Evidence: target/tmp/viewer-relocation/{doc-viewer,log-viewer}-{desktop,mobile}.png plus doc-viewer-mobile-closed.png. Existing doc mobile open-drawer close hitbox behavior is a UI risk unrelated to relocation; DOM close handler produced a clean settled state.
